title: The Coincidence of Opposites: The Only Truly Human Thought Process
description:
Moderator: Dennis Speed (U.S.), The Schiller Institute

05:32 Dr. Joycelyn Elders (U.S.), former United States Surgeon General, and Dr. David Satcher (U.S.), 16th Surgeon General of the United States, former U.S. Assistant Secretary of Health, former Director, Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC): “The Common Good Of All People Requires a Global Modern Health Care System”
25:00 Helga Zepp-LaRouche, President, The Schiller Institute
39:55 Boris Meshchanov (Russia), Counselor, Russian Federation Mission to the United Nations (NY): “The Russian Perspective on a Global Sustainable and Sustained Recovery”
53:00 Major General (ret.) Peter Clegg, U.S. Army and Rear Admiral (ret.), and Marc Y.E. Pelaez (U.S.): “National Defense Against Germ Warfare – The Military and Healthcare”
01:11:30 Question & Answer Session #1
01:55:38 Dr. Khadijah Lang (U.S.), Chairman, National Medical Association (NMA) Council on International Affairs; President, Golden State Medical Association, and Marcia Merry Baker (U.S.), Editorial Board, Executive Intelligence Review:  “Mozambique Pilot Aid Shipment — Action Diplomacy for World Health Security”
02:28:55 Mayor David Castro (Honduras), President, Mayors Without Borders Coalition: “Greetings to the Conference”
02:33:50 Diane Sare (U.S.), Candidate for United States Senate in New York; founder, Schiller Institute NYC Chorus:  “E Pluribus Unum: What We Can Learn from Beethoven”
03:24:22 Declaration of Independence and Rütli Oath
